Behaviors are controlled using two codebooks: the Global Codebook for overall communication quality and the WISER Codebook for specific countable behaviors. We evaluated SIMAX using automated and human quality assessments and an example communication coding system.
  Results. SIMAX generated 3,388 simulated dialogues across three specialties, multiple visit stages, persona characteristics, and accent conditions. Automated assessment showed mean UTMOS and WV-MOS scores of 3.03 and 2.61, WER and CER of 0.07 and 0.05, and CLAP cosine similarity of 0.41, suggesting reasonable speech naturalness, high transcription fidelity, and positive text-audio correspondence. Human evaluation showed a median MOS of 4.67 and a median clinical realism score of 3.00. Downstream evaluation suggests that SIMAX can assess how a communication coding system responds to behavioral targets and reveal insufficient sensitivity in some dimensions.
  Conclusions. SIMAX generates controlled and reproducible simulated clinician-patient dialogues, providing a data foundation for developing, validating, and refining communication coding systems.

</details>


### [373] [Regime-Aware Peer Specialization for Robust RAG under Heterogeneous Knowledge Conflicts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30518)
*Bo Wang,Heyan Huang,Yaolin Li,Yanghao Zhou,Jiahao Teng,Ziyi Yang,Ge Shi,Chong Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RAPS-DA通过样本级硬路由和三阶段专家分工（Grounding/Arbitration/Resistance）加上令牌级双选择器，在不增加模型规模或推理时专家访问的条件下，有效解决了RAG中检索上下文与参数知识冲突时的异构可靠性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG在检索上下文与模型参数知识冲突时表现脆弱，且现有方法对不同可靠性区间（可靠、部分可靠、对抗性）的冲突采用单一监督信号，导致学习信号混淆。

Method: 提出RAPS-DA框架：(1) 样本级：将冲突分为三类（Grounding/Arbitration/Resistance），训练三个同规模专家，每个样本硬路由到对应专家；(2) 令牌级：双选择器基于教师间分歧、学生-教师差异和学生熵，过滤无用令牌并聚焦高冲突令牌。

Result: 在5个冲突场景和2个OOD基准上，RAPS-DA超越了所有提示、解码、微调、强化学习和单教师基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过固定模型规模下的专家分工和令牌级精细选择，有效解耦异构冲突信号，且部署时无需区间标签或专家访问。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves language models by grounding generation in external context. However, it can be fragile when the retrieved context conflicts with the model's parametric knowledge. Such conflicts span a reliability spectrum, ranging from reliable and partially reliable evidence to adversarial context. Existing remedies often handle such heterogeneous conflicts with regime-agnostic supervision, which can conflate incompatible learning signals across reliability regimes. To disentangle these signals, we propose RAPS-DA, a regime-aware peer specialization framework that addresses conflict at two complementary granularities. At the sample level, conflicts are divided into three regimes, including Grounding, Arbitration, and Resistance, with one same-scale peer specialist trained per regime from a shared base model. Each sample is then hard-routed to its regime-matched peer for on-policy reverse-KL supervision. At the token level, a dual-layer selector uses inter-teacher disagreement, student-teacher divergence, and student entropy to filter uninformative or unstable tokens, upweight confidently misaligned ones, and gradually focus supervision on high-conflict tokens as the student matures. Gains stem from specialization at a fixed model scale, not from a stronger teacher, and the peer specialists exist only during training, so the deployed student requires no regime labels or peer access. Experiments on five conflict scenarios and two out-of-distribution benchmarks show RAPS-DA surpasses all prompting, decoding, fine-tuning, RL, and single-teacher baselines.

</details>


### [374] [TRACE: Temporal Relationship-Aware Conversational Entrainment Detection in Dyadic Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30543)
*Sathvik Manikantan Napa Ugandhar,Hao Zhang,Alison Gunzler,Yuzhe Wang,Thomas Thebaud,Georgi Tinchev,Venkatesh Ravichandran,Laureano Moro-Velázquez*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出DyadEE数据集和TRACE框架，用于检测双人语音对话中的情感趋同现象，通过对话上下文和关系信息提升检测精度，最高达97.01%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着语音AI代理的普及，理解对话交互中的情感趋同变得日益重要，而情感趋同受到社会关系和对话上下文的塑造。

Method: 构建DyadEE数据集（包含真实情感趋同对话和通过伙伴交换、情感重合成破坏趋同的合成交互）；提出TRACE框架，将双人交互建模为基于情感微调Whisper表征的有序声学嵌入序列，视为交互轨迹而非聚合话语。

Result: 实验表明，融入对话上下文和关系信息可提升情感趋同检测效果，TRACE框架取得97.01%的最高准确率。

Conclusion: 对话上下文和关系信息对情感趋同检测至关重要，基于窗口级别的交互轨迹建模方法优于传统聚合话语的方法。

Abstract: With the proliferation of speech AI agents, understanding emotional entrainment in conversational interaction has become increasingly important. Emotional entrainment is shaped by social relationships and conversational context, influencing affective coordination over time. We introduce DyadEE, a dataset for emotional entrainment detection in dyadic speech interactions, containing both emotionally entrained conversations and synthetic interactions where entrainment is disrupted through partner swapping and emotion resynthesis. We further propose TRACE, a window-level framework that models dyadic interaction as ordered sequences of acoustic embeddings derived from emotion fine-tuned Whisper representations, treating each sample as an interaction trace rather than pooled utterances. Experimental results on DyadEE show that incorporating conversational context and relationship information improves emotional entrainment detection, with TRACE achieving the best accuracy of 97.01%.

</details>


### [375] [Poller: Are LLMs Suitable for Evaluating the Poetry Understanding Task?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30556)
*Shanshan Wang,Derek F. Wong,Jingming Yao,Lidia S. Chao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Poller方法，让大语言模型扮演诗人角色来评估现代诗歌理解，在多个维度上显著降低评估误差，修辞手法维度误差降低94.55%，去熟悉化维度降低89.53%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自动评估方法不适用于现代诗歌，人工评估昂贵且难以大规模应用，需要一种兼具自动化效率和人类专业性的诗歌评估方法。

Method: Poller方法要求LLM扮演诗歌作者角色，获取作者详细信息并采用诗人视角进行评估，模拟人类判断过程，在八个专业维度上进行诗歌理解评估。

Result: Poller方法相比基线方法，修辞手法维度误差降低94.55%，去熟悉化维度误差降低89.53%，多个LLM在多个维度上的实验均验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法弥合了自动化效率与人类专业之间的鸿沟，为诗歌相关任务的自动化评估奠定了基础。

Abstract: Traditional automatic evaluation methods have been shown to be unsuitable for modern Chinese poetry because of the distinct nature of this literary genre. Human evaluation remains reliable, but is expensive and not applicable to large-scale data. In this paper, we propose Poller (Poetry LLM Evaluator), a novel method leveraging large language models (LLMs) to evaluate the poetry understanding task. Specifically, our method requires LLMs to play the role of a poem's author with detailed information, thereby emulating human evaluation and judgment by adopting the poet's perspective. We conducted comprehensive experiments on multiple LLMs, evaluating the interpretations of poems across eight specialized dimensions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method effectively reduces the evaluation error between LLMs and humans. Especially for specific dimension evaluation, Poller-based LLMs achieve a 94.55% and 89.53% error reduction for rhetorical techniques and defamiliarization, respectively, compared to baseline methods. These performances are unattainable by conventional LLM evaluation methods. Experimental results from multiple LLMs across various dimensions validate the efficacy of our method. This work bridges the gap between automated efficiency and human expertise, establishing a foundation for automated evaluation in poetry-related tasks.

</details>


### [376] [Morphing into Hybrid Attention Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30562)
*Disen Lan,Jianbin Zheng,Yuxi Ren,Xin Xia,Xuanda Wang,Xuefeng Xiao,Xipeng Qiu,Yu Cheng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FlashMorph提出了一种将Transformer高效转换为混合注意力模型（部分全注意力+部分线性注意力）的层选择方法，通过构建可变形模型并联合优化门控机制，在保持性能的同时大幅降低选择成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合注意力模型的层选择方法多依赖启发式策略（如固定模式或逐层评分），忽略了不同层在全局限定下的相互依赖效应，导致转换效果不佳。

Method: 将混合层选择建模为预算约束的子集优化问题；为每层配备线性注意力分支构建可变形模型；冻结权重后在合成长上下文检索数据上联合优化逐层门控，并加入线性化正则化；离散化门控得到混合架构，最后进行蒸馏和微调。

Result: FlashMorph能发现更有效的混合配置，在保持强长上下文召回率和通用基准性能的同时，显著降低了层选择成本。

Conclusion: FlashMorph在有效性、效率和可扩展性方面均优于现有层选择方法，验证了其方法的优越性。

Abstract: Hybrid attention models improve long-context efficiency by retaining only a subset of full-attention layers and replacing the remaining layers with linear attention. However, the effectiveness of Transformer-to-hybrid conversion critically depends on which layers preserve full attention. Existing hybrid layer selection methods typically rely on heuristic strategies such as fixed placement patterns or layerwise scoring, implicitly treating layer importance as isolated and overlooking the interdependent layer effect under a global hybrid configuration. In this work, we formulate hybrid layer selection as a budget-constrained subset optimization problem. We further propose FlashMorph (Fast LAyer Selection for Hybrid MORPHing), an effective, efficient and scalable layer selection method for Transformer-to-hybrid conversion. FlashMorph first constructs a morphable model by equipping each full-attention layer with a converted linear-attention branch. It then freezes all model weights and jointly optimizes layerwise gates on synthetic long-context retrieval data, with a linearization regularization that encourages the model to rely on linear attention for efficiency. The learned gates are discretized under a preset full-attention budget to instantiate the hybrid architecture, followed by standard logits distillation and long-context finetuning. Extensive experiments show that FlashMorph discovers more effective hybrid configurations, preserves strong long-context recall and general benchmark performance while substantially reducing layer selection cost compared with existing layer selection methods, demonstrating its effectiveness, efficiency, and scalability.

</details>


### [377] [Uncertainty-Aware Generation and Decision-Making Under Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30578)
*Nico Daheim,Iryna Gurevych*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文基于贝叶斯决策理论和风险规避决策，提出了多种不确定性感知的决策算法，用于提升LLM在辅导和自动同行评审等主观任务中的决策质量，并利用共形预测提供策略和分数的保证。实验表明，贝叶斯方法表现更好，而风险规避规则可能因生成通用输出而降低性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在复杂真实任务中应用广泛，许多任务具有高度主观性且需要模型输出可信，但决策算法方面的研究相对较少。

Method: 基于贝叶斯决策理论和风险规避决策，提出不确定性感知的决策算法；采用共形预测对策略和分数提供保证；在辅导和自动同行评审任务上进行评估。

Result: 这些算法能提升生成的效用，但需在高模糊性时谨慎实现；风险规避规则可能因生成通用输出而降低性能，而贝叶斯方法表现更优。

Conclusion: 本文利用决策理论改进了基于LLM的决策，并为社区指出了开放的挑战。

Abstract: With rapidly improving capabilities, Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used in many complex real-world tasks. Beyond requiring in-depth knowledge and reasoning skills, many of these tasks exhibit a high degree of subjectivity and require that the outputs of the model can be trusted. While a lot of progress has been made to train better models, decision-making algorithms have received less attention. In this work, we present and evaluate various uncertainty-aware decision-making algorithms based on Bayesian decision theory and risk-averse decision making on the tasks of tutoring and automatic peer reviewing. Concretely, we take uncertainty over tutoring strategies and review scores into account when generating a tutor response or review and use conformal prediction to provide guarantees over strategy and score. We find empirically that these algorithms can improve the utility of the generations but need to be carefully implemented when ambiguity is high. For example, risk-averse rules can degrade performance by optimizing for generic outputs, while Bayesian methods tend to perform better. Our work uses techniques from decision theory to improve LLM-based decision-making and outlines open challenges for the community.

</details>


### [378] [Scaling the Horizon, Not the Parameters: Reaching Trillion-Parameter Performance with a 35B Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30616)
*Lei Bai,Zongsheng Cao,Yang Chen,Zhiyao Cui,Shangheng Du,Yue Fan,Shiyang Feng,Zijie Guo,Haonan He,Liang He,Xiaohan He,Shuyue Hu,Yusong Hu,Songtao Huang,Yichen Jiang,Hao Li,Xin Li,Dahua Lin,Weihao Lin,Fenghua Ling,Dongrui Liu,Zhuo Liu,Runmin Ma,Chunjiang Mu,Haoyang Peng,Tianshuo Peng,Jinxin Shi,Luohe Shi,Boyuan Sun,Zelin Tan,Shengji Tang,Qianyi Wang,Yiming Wu,Yi Xie,Xiangchao Yan,Jingqi Ye,Peng Ye,Fangchen Yu,Jiakang Yuan,Bihao Zhan,Bo Zhang,Chen Zhang,Shufei Zhang,Shuaiyu Zhang,Wenlong Zhang,Yiqun Zhang,Junpeng Zhao,Zhijie Zhong,Bowen Zhou,Yuhao Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Agents-A1，一个35B参数的混合专家代理模型，通过扩展代理视野（平均45K token的轨迹）和异构能力蒸馏，在多个长视野基准测试上达到甚至超越1T参数模型的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索从长视野轨迹扩展和异构代理能力扩展两个角度实现代理视野缩放，使小参数模型在长视野任务上匹敌万亿参数模型。

Method: 1）全领域监督微调对齐基础模型；2）训练领域级教师模型捕获专业经验；3）提出多教师领域路由在线蒸馏，配合显著词汇对齐，将六个异构领域统一到一个可部署的学生模型中。

Result: Agents-A1 (35B) 在SEAL-0 (56.4)、IFBench (80.6)、HiPhO (46.4)、FrontierScience-Olympiad (79.0)、MolBench-Bind (56.8)上领先Kimi-K2.6和DeepSeek-V4-pro等1T模型；在SciCode (44.3)、HLE (47.6)、BrowseComp (75.5)上保持强竞争力。

Conclusion: 为社区提供了一条实用的路径：通过扩展代理视野，35B模型即可达到或匹配1T模型在长视野任务上的性能。

Abstract: We introduce Agents-A1, a 35B Mixture-of-Experts Agentic Model that reaches trillion-parameter-level performance by scaling the agent horizon. We investigate agent-horizon scaling from two perspectives: scaling long-horizon trajectories and scaling heterogeneous agent abilities. To support this goal, we build a long-horizon knowledge-action infrastructure that connects external knowledge, actions, observations, and verifier outcomes, producing agentic trajectories with an average length of 45K tokens. Based on this, we train Agents-A1 with a three-stage recipe. First, we perform full-domain supervised fine-tuning to align the base model with broad agentic behaviors. Second, we train domain-level teacher models to capture specialized expertise in each domain. Third, we propose a multi-teacher domain-routed on-policy distillation with salient vocabulary alignment to improve knowledge transfer efficiency across different domains, unifying six heterogeneous domains into one deployable student model. Agents-A1 achieves strong and broad performance for long-horizon agent benchmarks. Compared with 1T-parameter model such as Kimi-K2.6 and DeepSeek-V4-pro, Agents-A1 achieves leading results on SEAL-0 (56.4), IFBench (80.6), HiPhO (46.4), FrontierScience-Olympiad (79.0), and MolBench-Bind (56.8), and remains highly competitive on SciCode (44.3), HLE (47.6) and BrowseComp (75.5). We hope this work provides the community with a practical path for scaling the horizon using a 35B agent that can reach or match the performance of 1T models on long-horizon tasks.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [379] [A Good Talk Does not Look Like a Summary, It Teaches You! Measuring Takeaways from Paper-to-Video Talks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28531)
*Ishani Mondal,Aparna Garimella,Ananya Sai,Pannaga Shivaswamy,Jordan Boyd-Graber*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出EffectivePresentationScorer框架，用于评估科学演示视频的教学质量，发现现有生成视频虽覆盖正确内容但缺乏解释性和教学价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估指标只衡量视频的视觉质量或关键点是否出现，无法评估视频是否真正帮助观众理解论文思想。

Method: 设计EffectivePresentationScorer框架，从三个维度评估：清晰解释主要思想、介绍必要背景概念、将技术细节与论文主要贡献联系起来。

Result: 现有论文转视频系统生成的视频能提及正确主题并遵循论文结构，但未能解释预备概念或阐明方法为何有效，而这些缺陷被现有评估指标忽视。

Conclusion: 需要新的评估指标关注解释性质量而非仅仅内容存在性，以推动论文转视频系统真正提升教学效果。

Abstract: Automatically generated videos from scientific papers are increasingly used for education and research dissemination. However, existing evaluation metrics mainly measure visual quality or whether key points from the paper appear in the video without assessing whether the video actually helps viewers understand the ideas. We introduce EffectivePresentationScorer, a framework for evaluating the instructional quality of scientific presentation videos. It checks whether a video explains the main ideas clearly, introduces needed background concepts, and connects technical details to the main contribution of the paper. When we apply EffectivePresentationScorer to the existing paper-to-video generation systems, we find that generated videos mention the correct topics and follow the structure of the paper but fail to explain prerequisite concepts or clarify why the method works. These failures are often ignored by existing video evaluation metrics, which focus on content presence rather than explanatory quality.

</details>


### [380] [From Design Principles to Prototype: A Game for Students with ADHD and Learning Disabilities Transitioning to Post-Secondary Education](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29482)
*Avery Keuben,Talaal Irtija,Joseph Tandyo,Stefanie Ng,Amy Wiebe,Samuel Gaudet,Rebekah Leslie,Meadow Schroeder,Lauren Goegan,Richard Zhao*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一款基于文献设计的严肃游戏原型，旨在帮助患有ADHD和学习障碍的学生顺利过渡到高等教育阶段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 患有ADHD和学习障碍的学生在升入高等教育时面临学业、社交和组织管理上的显著挑战，现有支持手段不足。

Method: 综合前期相关研究，提炼出针对ADHD和LD学生的设计考量，并将这些考量实现在一个故事驱动的严肃游戏原型中。

Result: 构建了一个文献支撑的严肃游戏原型，展示了设计考量如何具体应用于游戏实现。

Conclusion: 该游戏原型有望为ADHD和LD学生提供有效的过渡支持，但尚需进一步评估其实际效果。

Abstract: Students with Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) and Learning Disabilities (LD) can face significant academic, social, and organizational challenges when transitioning to post-secondary education. This paper presents a literature-informed serious game prototype designed to support this transition. We synthesize prior work into design considerations for students with ADHD and LD and show how these considerations are instantiated in a story-driven game.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.TR'></div>

# q-fin.TR [[Back]](#toc)

### [381] [The Bounce Has No Direction: Sign, Magnitude, and the Microstructure of Equity Return Predictability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29591)
*Victoria Portnaya*

Main category: q-fin.TR

TL;DR: 本文提出了傅里叶残差恒等式(FRI)，将收益率自相关分解为符号通道和幅度通道，发现SPY滞后1期自相关完全由幅度驱动（而非方向反转），并证明该现象来源于买卖价差反弹和非同步成分滞后。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准方差比(VR)检验无法区分收益率自相关究竟反映方向性反转还是幅度收缩，而这两种现象具有完全不同的交易含义，因此需要更精细的分解工具。

Method: 提出傅里叶残差恒等式(FRI)，将自相关分解为符号通道(k=2)和幅度通道(k=4)；证明Fejer恒等式VR(q)=1+2C_q，赋予Lo-MacKinlay检验谱解释；引入子样本诊断统计量R_N分类自相关来源。

Result: SPY滞后1期自相关完全由幅度驱动（完整检验p<10^{-12}，符号检验p=0.11），表现为大波动后跟小波动；滞后3期存在显著性方向反转(p=0.02)；跨资产面板显示均值回归仅存在于交易所交易股票和主权债券。

Conclusion: SPY的滞后1期自相关本质是买卖价差反弹和非同步成分滞后导致的幅度收缩而非方向反转，FRI方法能有效分离不同滞后期的微观结构机制。

Abstract: SPY's lag-1 return autocorrelation ($\hatρ(1)=-0.081$, $z=-7.4$) is among the most significant regularities in empirical equity finance, yet the standard variance-ratio (VR) test cannot determine whether it reflects directional reversal or magnitude shrinkage - phenomena with entirely different trading implications. We develop the Fourier-Residue Identity (FRI), which decomposes return autocorrelation into a sign ($k=2$) and a magnitude ($k=4$) channel, each independently testable and neither redundant. Applied to six US instruments over 1993--2026 and a 21-instrument cross-asset panel, the FRI delivers a sharp microstructure diagnosis. The lag-1 autocorrelation in SPY is driven entirely by magnitude: the FRI sign test is insignificant ($p=0.11$) while the full test achieves $p<10^{-12}$. A large move yesterday predicts a smaller move today regardless of direction - the fingerprint of bid-ask bounce and non-synchronous constituent staleness, not directional reversal. At lag 3, a significant directional reversal ($p=0.02$) invisible to the scalar ACF reveals a separate partial-price-adjustment channel. We prove the Fejer identity VR(q)=1+2C_q (confirmed to <0.001 on all series), giving the Lo-MacKinlay test a spectral interpretation, and introduce a subsample diagnostic R_N=G_{N/2}/G_N that classifies equity autocorrelation as structural (R_N->1) rather than sampling noise (R_N->sqrt(2)). The cross-asset panel shows mean reversion confined to exchange-traded equities and sovereign bonds; credit ETFs, commodities, FX, and crypto are indistinguishable from random walks. All estimators pass 27 unit tests; Monte Carlo confirms correct 5% size under GARCH.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [382] [A Zero-Shot Deep Image Prior Framework for Denoising and Deconvolution in Fluorescence Microscopy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28431)
*Xiangyu Qian,Jing Liu,Yunqing Tang,Luru Dai,Qiushi Li*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: SDIP是一种零样本深度学习框架，通过顺序执行去噪和反卷积，无需外部训练数据即可恢复荧光显微镜图像，在BioSR数据集上取得了优异的信噪比和分辨率提升效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 有监督深度学习方法需要大量难以获取的成对数据集，因此需要一种无需外部训练数据的零样本图像恢复方法。

Method: SDIP框架包含两个阶段：1) aSeqDIP模块通过顺序自编码正则化进行去噪；2) RLG-DIP模块结合小波背景校正和Richardson-Lucy反卷积结果作为物理一致性的引导先验，进行伪影减少的反卷积。

Result: 在BioSR数据集上的实验表明，SDIP在多种细胞结构上同时提高了信噪比和分辨率，视觉质量和量化指标均优于对比方法。

Conclusion: SDIP提供了一种无需外部数据的零样本荧光显微镜图像恢复方案，并为其他逆问题设计物理引导的DIP方法提供了有益启示。

Abstract: Fluorescence microscopy images are degraded by noise and diffraction-induced blur, which compromise structural fidelity and limit quantitative analysis. Supervised deep learning methods achieve impressive restoration performance but require large-scale paired datasets that are difficult to obtain in practice. To address this issue, we propose SDIP, a zero-shot deep image prior (DIP) framework that sequentially performs denoising and deconvolution without external training data. An aSeqDIP-based module first suppresses noise while preserving fine structures through sequential autoencoding regularization. In the deconvolution stage, a wavelet-based background correction step is incorporated before the proposed RLG-DIP module performs artifact-reduced deconvolution. RLG-DIP uses the Richardson-Lucy deconvolution result as a physically consistent guidance prior, integrating the imaging model with the implicit prior of DIP to stabilize the ill-posed deconvolution process. Experiments on the BioSR dataset across multiple cellular structures demonstrate that SDIP improves both signal-to-noise ratio and resolution, achieving superior visual quality and improved quantitative performance on most evaluated structures. The proposed framework may also provide useful insights for designing physically guided DIP methods for other inverse problems.

</details>


### [383] [Measured-Subspace Consistency: A Plug-and-Play Operator for Diffusion Posterior Sampling in Accelerated MRI Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28448)
*Junhyeok Lee,Kyu Sung Choi*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文针对加速MRI扩散后验采样中的测量子空间泄漏问题，提出无需训练的终端修正方法MSC，有效将样本差异约束到零空间，大幅降低测量子空间色散（最高~29x），同时保持未测量子空间多样性，且不降低PSNR/SSIM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散后验采样器在加速MRI重建中，不同采样样本在已测量的k-space系数上仍存在差异（测量子空间泄漏），这违反了物理可容许性，导致不确定度被夸大。作者旨在量化并修正这一泄漏问题。

Method: 提出互补的测量子空间色散(MSD)和未测量子空间色散(USD)指标来量化泄漏；设计MSC（测量子空间一致性）终端修正方法，将任何兼容的图像空间后验采样器与标准多线圈一致性锁结合，将样本差异约束到MRI零空间。

Result: 在6种基础采样器和2种MRI解剖结构（含跨域迁移：膝盖先验重建脑部）上，MSC对Soft类采样器实现中位数16.5x（DPS，5种脑部对比，最高~29x）的MSD降低，同时保持USD多样性，对Consistent类采样器近恒等映射，PSNR/SSIM维持或略有提升。

Conclusion: MSC是一种训练免费、调参免费、计算开销极小的黑盒后验审计与修正方法，有效解决了加速MRI中扩散后验采样的物理不可容许性问题。

Abstract: Diffusion posterior samplers for accelerated MRI can reconstruct accurately yet still disagree on the acquired k-space across samples, placing posterior variability on coefficients the scanner has already measured. We identify this measured-subspace leakage as a physical-admissibility failure. Under a hard-constraint model it violates the measurement constraint and inflates the reported uncertainty with disagreement about coefficients the scanner has already determined. To quantify this leakage, we introduce complementary measured- and unmeasured-subspace k-space dispersion metrics (MSD/USD). We then present Measured-Subspace Consistency (MSC), a training-free terminal correction that wraps any compatible image-space posterior sampler with a standard multi-coil consistency lock. The ideal lock follows classical range/null-space data consistency. Our contribution is to repurpose it as a black-box posterior audit and correction rather than a new reconstructor or learned sampler. Theoretically, we prove that the ideal transform confines pairwise sample differences to the MRI null space and bound the residual cross-subspace coupling left by practical sensitivity-weighted implementations. Across six base samplers and two MRI anatomies, including out-of-distribution transfer where a knee prior reconstructs brain, MSC substantially reduces measured-subspace dispersion for Soft samplers (a median 16.5x reduction for DPS across five brain contrasts, up to ~29x), while preserving unmeasured-subspace diversity and acting as a near-identity map for Consistent ones. Furthermore, MSC maintains or modestly improves PSNR/SSIM, with no retraining, retuning, or significant computational overhead.

</details>


### [384] [DeVAR: Low-Dose CT Denoising via Visual Autoregressive Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28453)
*Xizhuo Zhang,Yannian Gu,Zhongzhen Huang,Shaoting Zhang,Xiaofan Zhang*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出DeVAR框架，首次将视觉自回归建模（VAR）应用于低剂量CT去噪，通过全局上下文条件生成、残差细化器和双表示混合训练，在保持图像细节的同时实现高质量去噪。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低剂量CT在减少辐射的同时会引入噪声和伪影影响诊断，现有深度学习方法虽有效，但缺乏能内在捕获全局到局部结构依赖性的生成范式，以更好地保留精细解剖细节。

Method: 1) 基于LDCT前缀token提供全局上下文条件，通过下一个尺度预测（next-scale prediction）逐步生成目标NDCT的离散token图；2) 引入残差细化器捕获离散码本无法表达的高频细节；3) 采用双表示混合训练策略，将连续和离散潜在表示无缝集成以重建高保真图像。

Result: 在两个公开数据集上，DeVAR在定性和定量指标上均一致优于现有最先进的LDCT去噪方法。

Conclusion: DeVAR通过视觉自回归建模有效解决了LDCT去噪中细节保留与噪声抑制的权衡问题，为医学图像生成提供了新范式。

Abstract: Computed tomography (CT) plays a crucial role in medical diagnosis, but minimizing radiation exposure while maintaining image quality remains a critical challenge. Low-dose CT (LDCT) protocols reduce radiation risks but inevitably suffer from severe noise and artifacts that compromise diagnostic accuracy. While existing deep learning methods have achieved promising results, there remains a continuous quest for generative paradigms that intrinsically capture global-to-local structural dependencies to better preserve fine anatomical details. To this end, we propose DeVAR, a novel generative framework that applies visual autoregressive modeling (VAR) to LDCT denoising for the first time. Conditioned on global context provided by LDCT prefix tokens, DeVAR progressively generates discrete token maps of the target normal-dose CT (NDCT) via next-scale prediction. Because quantization inherently discards high-frequency information, we introduce a residual refiner to capture subtle anatomical structures beyond the capacity of a discrete codebook. Finally, empowered by a dual-representation hybrid training strategy, our hybrid NDCT decoder seamlessly integrates continuous and discrete latents to reconstruct high-fidelity, detail-preserved images. Extensive experiments on two public datasets demonstrate that DeVAR consistently achieves superior qualitative and quantitative performance compared to state-of-the-art LDCT denoising methods.

</details>


### [385] [Anatomy-Grounded Synthetic Coronary Angiography for Geometry-Informed Multi-View Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28474)
*In Kyu Lee,Sumin Seo,Jaesik Min*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于物理的数据生成框架，通过从3D冠状动脉CT血管造影合成高保真数字重建放射影像，解决血管造影匹配任务中标注数据稀缺的问题，并设计了几何信息匹配模块实现高精度对应匹配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 血管造影多视角对应匹配是3D冠状动脉重建和介入导航的关键，但获取匹配任务的真实标注成本极高且难以规模化，严重制约了深度学习模型的发展。

Method: 提出物理驱动的数据生成框架，从3D CCTA体积合成高保真DRR，模拟C型臂采集几何生成密集3D到2D投影标签；同时提出几何信息匹配模块，将全局特征和解剖结构融入对应学习。

Result: 在CT衍生的DRR数据集上进行了全面评估，相较于其他匹配基线模型取得了改进效果。

Conclusion: 该框架实现了零人工成本的高质量标注数据生成，并提供无人工评估方案，有效突破了血管造影匹配任务的数据瓶颈。

Abstract: Accurate correspondence matching across multiple angiographic views is the prerequisite for 3D coronary reconstruction and interventional guidance. However, the development of robust deep learning models for this task has been stifled by a fundamental data bottleneck. Obtaining ground truth for matching tasks in angiography pairs is prohibitively expensive and hard to scale. To overcome this barrier, we introduce a physically-grounded data generation framework that synthesizes high-fidelity Digital Reconstructed Radiographs (DRRs) from 3D Coronary CT Angiography (CCTA) volumes. Our framework generates dense, highly accurate 3D-to-2D projection labels by simulating realistic C-arm acquisition geometry on patient anatomy at zero human cost. Leveraging this dense supervision, we propose a Geometry-Informed Matching Module (GIMM) that integrates global feature and anatomical structure into correspondence learning. Unlike real angiography where assessment relies on subjective human annotation, our dataset provides 2D correspondence labels with paired images, allowing human-free evaluation. We comprehensively evaluate our method on the proposed CT-derived DRR dataset and demonstrate improvements over other matching baseline models.

</details>


### [386] [Complete virtual unwrapping and reading of a rolled Herculaneum papyrus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29085)
*Giorgio Angelotti,Stephen Parsons,Federica Nicolardi,Youssef Nader,Sean Johnson,David Josey,Paul Henderson,Hendrik Schilling,Johannes Rudolph,Forrest McDonald,Elian Rafael Dal Prá,Paul Tafforeau,Alessandro Mirone,Clifford Seth Parker,Jan Paul Posma,Benjamin Kyles,Claudio Vergara,Alessia Lavorante,Rossella Villa,Maria Chiara Robustelli,Marzia D'Angelo,Gianluca Del Mastro,Michael McOsker,Kilian Fleischer,Christy Chapman,Nat Friedman,William Brent Seales*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文利用高分辨率相位对比显微CT和机器学习，首次完整虚拟展开并阅读了赫库兰尼姆纸莎草卷PHerc. 1667，无需物理打开。同时通过优化扫描协议使PHerc. Paris 4中的墨水在断层体积中直接可见，并在PHerc. 139中恢复出标题和作者归属证据，证明该卷为菲洛德莫斯的《论神》第八卷。这些成果将虚拟展开从孤立演示推向可扩展的系统性框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 赫库兰尼姆碳化纸莎草卷是古典时代唯一幸存的大型图书馆，但许多未打开的卷轴因物理打开可能造成不可逆损坏而无法阅读。此前对密封卷轴的研究仅能恢复局部读数或有限表面区域，亟需一种可规模化、非侵入性的完整虚拟展开与阅读方法。

Method: 在欧洲同步辐射设施BM18光束线上获取高分辨率相位对比显微CT数据，结合改进的计算展开算法和机器学习技术，实现完整的虚拟展开和阅读。对PHerc. Paris 4采用优化扫描协议使墨水在断层体积中直接可见，实现三维墨水分割。

Result: 成功完整虚拟展开并阅读了PHerc. 1667，使其成为首个无需物理打开即可供学术研究的赫库兰尼姆纸莎草卷。在PHerc. Paris 4中实现了墨水直接成像和三维分割。在PHerc. 139中恢复了标题和作者信息，确认为菲洛德莫斯的《论神》第八卷。

Conclusion: 这些成果将赫库兰尼姆卷轴的虚拟展开从孤立的演示推进到可扩展的系统性框架，为系统化恢复尚未打开的图书馆藏品奠定了基础。

Abstract: The carbonized papyri from Herculaneum preserve the only large-scale library to survive from classical antiquity, but many unopened rolls remain unread because physical opening risks irreversible damage. X-ray computed microtomography ($μ$CT) and virtual unwrapping offer a non-invasive route to their texts, yet previous work on sealed Herculaneum scrolls has recovered only localized readings or limited surface regions. Here, using high-resolution phase-contrast $μ$CT acquired on the BM18 beamline at the European Synchrotron Radiation Facility (ESRF), together with improved computational unrolling and machine learning, we achieve the complete virtual unwrapping and reading of PHerc. 1667 under explicit coverage and papyrological-review criteria. This makes PHerc. 1667 the first Herculaneum papyrus to be fully digitally unrolled and read for extended scholarly study without physical opening. In PHerc. Paris 4, the optimized scan protocol makes ink directly visible in the tomographic volume, allowing three-dimensional ink segmentation and independent validation of surface-conditioned ink recovery. In PHerc. 139, we recover title and author-attribution evidence identifying the scroll as Philodemus, On Gods, Book 8. These results move virtual unwrapping of the Herculaneum scrolls beyond isolated demonstrations towards a scalable framework for systematic recovery of the still-unopened library.

</details>


### [387] [HDDPM: Heteroscedastic Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model for Quantitative Low-Count Brain PET Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28513)
*Raymond Confidence,Udunna C. Anazodo*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种异方差残差扩散模型（HDDPM），通过引入基于泊松分布的体素级噪声图，在低计数PET图像恢复中实现了对活动依赖性噪声结构的物理建模，在极低剂量（1%）外部扫描中显著优于标准DDPM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准DDPM的前向过程添加各向同性、同方差的高斯噪声，无法捕捉PET噪声的非高斯、非平稳、空间依赖及活动依赖性等物理特性，导致模型无法真实模拟成像系统的退化过程。

Method: 设计了一个固定的、基于泊松的方差模块生成体素级噪声图，使低活动区域受到更强的噪声扰动；同时网络在显式剂量分数条件下预测低计数到标准计数的残差。

Result: 在三个不同扫描仪、多种模拟剂量水平（1%~50%）的内外部数据集上，HDDPM与标准DDPM整体图像质量相当，但在最低剂量（1%）外部扫描中表现突出，显著降低了高、低活动区域的测量误差。

Conclusion: 异方差加噪的HDDPM是可行的，通过反映PET的活动依赖性噪声结构，为定量低计数PET恢复提供了物理驱动的归纳偏置。

Abstract: Positron emission tomography (PET) seeks to balance diagnostic quality with ra-diation dose. Low-count PET noise is non-Gaussian, non-stationary, and spatial-ly dependent. It scales directly with local activity and is shaped by iterative recon-struction and physical corrections. Standard denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) ignore these PET properties. Their forward process adds iso-tropic, homoscedastic Gaussian noise to the target. Such an approach fails to cap-ture the realistic physical degradation generated by the imaging system. To ad-dress the above limitations, this study introduces a heteroscedastic residual diffu-sion model (HDDPM) for low-count brain PET recovery in which the forward corruption is itself intensity-aware. We designed a fixed, Poisson-based variance module to generate voxel-wise noise maps. These maps naturally place stronger noise perturbation on low-activity regions than high-activity ones, meanwhile the network predicts the low-to-standard-count residual under explicit dose-fraction conditioning. We evaluated our proposed model (HDDPM) alongside generative frameworks across three different scanners, using both internal and external da-tasets at various simulated dose levels (1% to 50%). HDDPM and isotropic DDPM showed comparable overall image quality, but HDDPM stood out in the lowest-dose (1%) external scans. It is highly reliable and significantly reduces measurement errors in both high- and low-activity regions, compared to the standard model. These results support that heteroscedastic noising with the pro-posed HDDPM is feasible, and it provides a physically motivated inductive bias for quantitative low-count PET recovery by reflecting the activity-dependent noise structure of PET.

</details>


### [388] [Performance Analysis of Hardware-Accelerated 10-Bit 4:2:2 Encoding with Split-Frame Encoding for High-Fidelity V-PCC Streaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29179)
*Kasidis Arunruangsirilert,Jiro Katto*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文研究了NVIDIA Blackwell GPU上的硬件编码器对V-PCC实时编码的可行性，证明4路分帧编码可在8K 10-bit 4:2:2 HEVC下达到122 fps，满足高密度动态点云实时压缩需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统V-PCC需要10-bit 4:2:2色深和亚采样，旧GPU硬件编码器不支持此格式，只能依赖专用ASIC。Blackwell架构首次引入对此格式的硬件支持，本文旨在探究用通用GPU替代专用硬件的可行性。

Method: 使用Blackwell GPU（含4个并行片内硬件编码器）作为测试平台，在不同分帧编码（SFE）配置下评估8K 10-bit 4:2:2 HEVC编码的吞吐量、率失真性能和功耗。

Result: 4路SFE达到122 fps编码吞吐量，满足实时要求；BD-Rate惩罚最高5%（因无法跨切片边界利用空间冗余）；功耗和吞吐量表现良好。

Conclusion: 商用Blackwell GPU可成为实时高密度V-PCC编码的可行基线方案，推动从专用ASIC向通用GPU的转变。

Abstract: Video-based Point Cloud Compression (V-PCC) encodes volumetric data by projecting 3D geometry and texture onto 2D video frames. To prevent spatial distortion and color bleeding during 3D reconstruction, this process requires 10-bit color depth and 4:2:2 chroma subsampling, rather than the standard 8-bit 4:2:0 format. Additionally, capturing high-density dynamic point clouds requires demanding encoding parameters, such as 8K resolution at framerates up to 120 fps. Historically, the lack of 4:2:2 chroma support in older GPU hardware encoders restricted real-time V-PCC to custom Application-Specific Integrated Circuits (ASICs). However, the recent introduction of NVIDIA's Blackwell GPU architecture, featuring on-chip hardware encoders with 10-bit 4:2:2 support, presents an opportunity to shift this workload to general-purpose hardware. This paper investigates the feasibility of such an approach. Using a commercially available Blackwell GPU equipped with four parallel on-die hardware encoders as a testbed, we evaluate the throughput, rate-distortion (RD) performance, and power consumption of 8K 10-bit 4:2:2 HEVC across various Split-Frame Encoding (SFE) configurations. Our results demonstrate that 4-way SFE achieves an encoding throughput of 122 fps, successfully meeting the strict real-time constraints of high-density V-PCC. Although the inability to exploit spatial redundancies across slice boundaries results in a BD-Rate penalty of up to 5%, the measured throughput and power efficiency establish standard, commercial off-the-shelf GPUs as a highly viable baseline for real-time volumetric video streaming.

</details>


### [389] [Envisage: Diffusion-Based Rhinoplasty Goal Visualization with Mask-Decomposed Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28628)
*Mudit Agarwal,Amit D. Bhrany*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出Envisage流水线用于鼻整形（及眼睑整形、面部除皱）效果可视化，并引入SurgicalScore作为局部编辑的专门评估指标，证明全脸身份指标在硬合成编辑场景下无法准确衡量局部编辑质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式编辑的评估依赖全脸身份相似度指标，但这些指标在硬合成（hard-composited）局部编辑中会被未修改像素主导，无法真实反映编辑区域的质量，因此需要专门的局部编辑评估方法。

Method: 基于FLUX.1-Fill修复模型构建Envisage流水线，包含8种鼻整形临床预设、MediaPipe掩码和硬掩码合成。提出SurgicalScore评估协议，从编辑方向、编辑幅度、掩码LPIPS、真实感和掩码外保持五个维度评分。

Result: 在N=211数据集上，所有方法的ArcFace增益均为负值（Envisage最佳-0.048），SurgicalScore下Envisage最高（0.599）。Oracle实验将ArcFace差距缩减73%，33.9%案例实现正向输出-真实增益。

Conclusion: 局部编辑应使用编辑区域保真度而非全脸身份指标进行评估。Envisage和相关工具已开源发布。

Abstract: Localized generative editing needs localized evaluation: full-image identity metrics are structurally confounded under hard-composited edits. We present Envisage, a FLUX.1-Fill inpainting reference pipeline for rhinoplasty goal visualization from a single frontal photograph. The pipeline combines 8 rhinoplasty clinical presets (the released framework also includes 8 blepharoplasty and 8 rhytidectomy presets), MediaPipe masks, and hard-mask compositing. The composite preserves outside-mask pixels by construction, so full-face identity scores are dominated by copied pixels rather than by the diffusion backbone. Because full-face identity metrics cannot grade localized edits, we introduce SurgicalScore, a mask-decomposed 0-1 protocol scoring edit direction, edit magnitude, masked LPIPS, realism, and outside-mask preservation; SS_raw assigns 0.919 [0.918, 0.920] to a perfect-predictor control , anchoring the ceiling. On N=211, the paired ArcFace gain (output-to-GT minus input-to-GT) is negative for all methods (Envisage -0.048 smallest, vs. ICEdit -0.139, Kontext -0.242, InstructPix2Pix -0.294; p < 1e-4), with external validation on a 457-pair ASPS/PCA corpus showing a larger negative gap. With SurgicalScore, Envisage achieves the highest score (0.599 [0.579, 0.619]) and leads on both metrics, but the all-negative ArcFace gap shows that full-face identity is poorly aligned with localized surgical accuracy under hard compositing. A 5-seed GT-oracle (an upper bound, not a deployable result) reduces the residual ArcFace gap by 73% (-0.054 to -0.015), with positive output-to-GT gain on 33.9% of cases, indicating candidate-space headroom for a learned ranker. For localized edits, progress should be measured with edit-region fidelity rather than full-face identity metrics. We release Envisage, SurgicalScore, preset definitions, and matched split manifests.

</details>


### [390] [A Neuroimaging Simulation Framework for Developing and Evaluating Causal AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28684)
*Eryn Libert-Scott,Emma A. M. Stanley,Vibujithan Vigneshwaran,Matthias Wilms,Erik Y. Ohara,Nils D. Forkert*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种生成具有显式因果控制的高质量合成神经影像框架，用于解决因果人工智能方法在医学影像（尤其是神经影像）中缺乏基准真实数据的问题。通过在T1加权MRI中模拟解剖变异和因果结构，实现了对感兴趣区域的精确体积控制，并初步评估了现有因果发现方法的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将疾病相关因素与影像生物标志物进行因果关联是理解疾病机制的重要途径，但因果AI方法在复杂医学影像（特别是神经影像）中缺乏经过标注的真实基准数据，阻碍了方法开发与评估。

Method: 提出一种合成神经影像生成框架：从真实数据估计子空间采样建模解剖变异，通过变形模板图像生成独特模拟对象；通过精确控制感兴趣区域的体积变化编码因果结构，避免全局伪影。

Result: 目标区域相对体积误差为0.3-2.66%，非目标脑区的平均绝对误差为0.034-0.397ml。因果发现方法的初步评估显示其抑制虚假连接的能力有限。

Conclusion: 该框架首次实现了具有显式因果控制的逼真3D合成神经影像生成，可作为缺失的基准真实数据，用于因果AI方法的客观基准测试与开发。

Abstract: Causally linking disease-related factors to image-derived biomarkers provides a powerful pathway to understanding disease mechanisms. Despite growing interest in applying causal artificial intelligence (AI) approaches for this task, these methods still need to be adapted for complex medical images, and especially, neuroimaging. However, the lack of ground-truth data presents a barrier to development. To bridge this gap, we developed and tested a method for generating synthetic neuroimages, which adhere to a user-specified causal structure describing the non-image to image variable relationships, permitting the creation of ground-truth neuroimaging datasets. In the simulated T1-weighted magnetic resonance images, anatomical variability is modeled by sampling from a subspace estimated from real data and deforming a template image to create unique simulated subjects. Causal relationships are encoded via precise volumetric changes of any region-of-interest without unwanted global artifacts. We achieved relative volume errors of 0.3-2.66% for the targeted regions-of-interest and demonstrate their statistically significant causal relationships, while maintaining mean absolute errors for non-target brain regions between 0.034-0.397ml. An initial evaluation of causal discovery methods exposes their limited ability to suppress spurious connections, highlighting the need for image-appropriate methods. Our framework is the first to enable the generation of realistic synthetic 3D neuroimages with explicit causal control that can serve as the missing ground-truth data necessary for the objective benchmarking and development of causal AI methods.

</details>


### [391] [BLUE: A Stale-Pixel Optical-Flow Compositor for Entropy-Efficient Surveillance Video Encoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28753)
*Shubham Baid,Akash James,Sahil Chachra,Nishant Sinha,Kunal Kislay*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: BLUE是一种预编码合成器，通过用持久种子帧替换静态背景像素，在编码前减少冗余，从而在保持前景质量的同时显著降低监控视频的存储大小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续录制监控系统面临存储问题，单纯调整编码器参数无法解决静态场景中背景重复编码导致的位浪费。

Method: BLUE维护一个持久种子帧作为背景，编码前将背景像素替换为种子帧像素，使编码器对冻结背景输出SKIP宏块，而前景区域保持原始质量。此外，设计了一个轻量级部署门控，通过2秒前缀的VMAF评估选择性激活策略。

Result: 在VIRAT数据集上，CRF 28时x264/x265分别平均减少34.6%/39.4%文件大小；前景PSNR在60.7%片段中保持或提升（平均+0.36 dB）；全帧VMAF中位数下降6.75-8.59分，但门控机制可识别40%片段中退化几乎不可感知。

Conclusion: BLUE在监控视频存储压缩方面有效，通过显式量化质量-存储权衡并提供选择性激活策略，实现了可接受的感知质量与显著存储节省的平衡。

Abstract: Continuous-recording surveillance systems face a storage problem that codec tuning alone cannot fully solve: even at aggressive CRF settings, a static-camera scene spends most of its bits re-encoding a background that has not changed. We present BLUE, a pre-encode compositor that exploits this structure by maintaining a persistent seed frame of the background and substituting background pixels with seed pixels before the encoder runs. The encoder then emits near-free SKIP macroblocks for the frozen background, while live pixels in foreground regions are carried unchanged at full quality. We evaluate BLUE on all 308 annotated short subclips from the VIRAT Ground Surveillance Release 2.0 dataset using a six-point CRF sweep with both x264 and x265. At CRF 28, BLUE reduces file size by a mean of 34.6% (x264) / 39.4% (x265) on 95.8% / 99.4% of clips respectively. Foreground-region PSNR, computed only over VIRAT object-annotation bounding boxes, is preserved or improved on 60.7% of clips (+0.36 dB mean, +5.48 dB maximum). Full-frame perceptual quality (VMAF) drops by a median of 6.75-8.59 points; we quantify and disclose this trade-off explicitly. A lightweight deployment gate measuring the compositor's own VMAF on a 2-second prefix identifies the 40% of clips where even full-frame quality degradation is near-imperceptible (Delta VMAF <= -2.9), enabling a selective-activation strategy that retains both the storage benefit and acceptable perceptual fidelity.

</details>


### [392] [A Task-Driven and Quality-Assured Agent Framework for SAR Data Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28896)
*Xuanting Wu,Fan Zhanga,Fei Ma,Ling Guan,Guochun Ma,Yongsheng Zhou*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出SAGA智能体框架，通过模式验证和收益评估实现任务导向的SAR数据增强与生成，提升了增强决策的可靠性与可复现性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAR数据增强对提升数据驱动模型泛化能力很重要，但实际应用中面临数据集格式异构、元数据依赖任务、生成方法多样、生成样本验证薄弱等挑战。

Method: SAGA框架：自然语言请求输入→提取数据集事实→验证可执行模式→通过验证器约束规划选择增强策略→编译为可审计工作流→多维度评估（质量、分布、SAR伪影、重复、泄露、下游任务）。

Result: 在受控智能体基准和下游SAR解释任务上，SAGA在模式接地、技能规划、无效样本拒绝和下游增强效用方面优于规则、纯LLM、ReAct风格和固定增强基线。

Conclusion: 通过分离语义提议与确定性验证执行，SAGA提升了SAR增强决策的可靠性和可复现性。

Abstract: Synthetic aperture radar (SAR) data augmentation is important for improving the generalization of data-driven SAR interpretation models, yet practical augmentation workflows are often hindered by heterogeneous dataset formats, task-dependent metadata requirements, diverse generation methods, and weak validation of generated samples. This paper presents the \textbf{S}AR \textbf{A}ugmentation and \textbf{G}eneration \textbf{A}gent (SAGA), a schema-grounded and benefit-aware agent framework for task-oriented SAR data generation and augmentation. Given a natural-language request and heterogeneous SAR inputs, SAGA extracts observable dataset facts, validates executable dataset schemas, selects feasible augmentation strategies through validator-constrained planning, and compiles the selected strategy into an auditable augmentation workflow. Generated data are further assessed by quality, distribution, SAR-artifact, duplicate, leakage, and optional downstream-task evaluators to support evidence-qualified augmentation claims. By separating semantic proposal from deterministic validation and execution, SAGA improves the reliability and reproducibility of SAR augmentation decisions. Experiments on controlled agentic benchmarks and downstream SAR interpretation tasks show that SAGA improves schema grounding, skill planning, invalid-sample rejection, and downstream augmentation utility compared with rule-based, LLM-only, ReAct-style, and fixed-augmentation baselines.

</details>


### [393] [Cross-Sensor SAR Data Generation Using Diffusion Models and Feature Migration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28922)
*Xuanting Wu,Fan Zhang,Fei Ma,Qiang Yin,Yongsheng Zhou*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种结合稳定扩散模型与注意力蒸馏的数据生成与迁移框架，通过微调LoRA模块和注意力蒸馏机制，为新型SAR传感器生成适配的训练数据，缓解跨传感器数据稀缺问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同SAR传感器在分辨率、极化模式和频段上差异显著，现有模型难以直接迁移到新发射的SAR卫星上；新系统需要大量标注数据重新训练模型，但短期内收集足量数据不可行。

Method: 采用多模态扩散Transformer（MM-DiT）架构，微调LoRA模块实现文本引导的类别可控SAR图像生成；引入注意力蒸馏机制，将目标域真实数据的传感器特定特征（空间纹理、散斑分布、结构模式）迁移至生成模型。

Result: 在两个真实星载SAR系统的多类飞机目标数据集上实验，验证了所提框架在缓解数据稀缺和支持跨传感器遥感应用方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架能有效利用历史SAR数据为新系统合成训练数据，克服数据不足问题，支持跨传感器遥感应用。

Abstract: Different synthetic aperture radar (SAR) sensors vary significantly in resolution, polarization modes, and frequency bands, making it difficult to directly apply existing models to newly launched SAR satellites. These new systems require large amounts of labeled data for model retraining, but collecting sufficient data in a short time is often infeasible. To address this contradiction, this paper proposes a data generation and transfer framework, integrating a stable diffusion model with attention distillation, that leverages historical SAR data to synthesize training data tailored to the unique characteristics of new SAR systems. Specifically, we fine-tune the low-rank adaptation (LoRA) modules within the multimodal diffusion transformer (MM-DiT) architecture to enable class-controllable SAR image generation guided by textual prompts. To ensure that the generated images reflect the statistical properties and imaging characteristics of the target SAR system, we further introduce an attention distillation mechanism that transfers sensor-specific features, such as spatial texture, speckle distribution, and structural patterns, from real target-domain data to the generative model. Extensive experiments on multi-class aircraft target datasets from two real spaceborne SAR systems demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach in alleviating data scarcity and supporting cross-sensor remote sensing applications.

</details>


### [394] [A Self-Supervised Learning Framework for Video Encoding Complexity Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29166)
*Krishna Srikar Durbha,Hassene Tmar,Ping-Hao Wu,Ioannis Katsavounidis,Alan C. Bovik*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出一种名为压缩回波对比学习（CECL）的自监督学习框架，通过利用视频对压缩的响应作为监督信号，对视频进行编码复杂度聚类，从而优化自适应视频流中的编码设置，实验表明该方法优于现有视觉编码器，并能带来比特率和质量的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自适应视频流中，不同视频内容的最优编码设置差异显著，现有方法难以高效确定编码复杂度并进行针对性优化。

Method: 提出CECL框架，利用视频对压缩的响应（压缩回波）作为自监督信号，通过对比学习预训练模型，捕捉视频的编码特性，进而对视频进行编码复杂度聚类。

Result: 在聚类编码复杂度的下游任务中，CECL优于现有最先进的视觉编码器，并在固定码率阶梯上实现了显著的比特率和质量节约。

Conclusion: CECL能有效利用压缩回波信号学习视频编码特性，为自适应视频流的编码优化提供有效方案。

Abstract: Adaptive video streaming is a widely used technique for delivering video content over the internet. One of the key challenges is determining the optimal encoding settings for each video, which can vary significantly based on its content and characteristics. In this paper, we propose Compression Echo Contrastive Learning (CECL), a novel self-supervised learning framework for clustering videos based on their encoding complexity. Our method leverages the response of a video to compression - the Compression Echo - as a supervisory signal, allowing the model to capture underlying encoding characteristics during pretraining. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of our learned representations for the downstream task of clustering videos by their encoding complexity. Our results show that CECL improves upon existing state-of-the-art visual encoders and delivers strong bitrate and quality savings against the fixed bitrate ladder.

</details>


### [395] [Data-Efficient Multimodal Alignment for Histopathology-based Molecular Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29949)
*Dominik Winter,Dominik Vonficht,Loïc Le Bescond,Christian Gebbe,Marco Rosati,Richard J. Chen,Markus Schick,Ross Stewart,Nicolas Brieu*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种轻量级对齐模块，结合冻结的H&E病理图像和RNA-seq基础模型，通过对比学习实现无需测序的开放词汇分子提示，在1720例多癌种队列中检索性能提升25倍，并在临床试验中验证了临床效用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: H&E染色全切片图像虽有丰富的空间信息和队列规模可用性，但缺乏分子特异性；而bulk RNA-seq虽提供全转录组分辨率，但成本高且存档样本有限。现有方法无法有效结合两者的优势。

Method: 在冻结的病理图像和RNA-seq基础模型之上训练轻量级对齐模块，采用对比学习在多癌种队列（N=1,720）上进行训练，实现开放词汇的分子提示——通过基因集签名查询H&E切片以预测通路活性。

Result: 检索性能相比基线方法提升25倍；形态学相关的程序（细胞周期、免疫相关）预测可靠（R²>0.5）；在POSEIDON临床试验中，预测的鳞状细胞癌评分复现NSCLC亚型身份，预测的IFN-gamma反映PD-L1肿瘤细胞表达分组；免疫激活和纤维化基因集可从组织学预测肿瘤微环境原型。

Conclusion: 该方法在未见过的队列中泛化良好，且数据高效的领域自适应可行，建立了一种基于H&E图像进行分子分析的切片原生框架。

Abstract: H&E-stained whole-slide images offer cohort-scale availability and rich spatial context but lack molecular specificity, whereas bulk RNA-seq provides transcriptome-wide resolution at high cost with limited archival availability. We show that training a lightweight alignment module atop frozen histopathology and RNA-Seq foundation models enables open-vocabulary molecular prompting -- querying H&E slides with gene-set signatures to predict pathway activity without sequencing or end-to-end retraining. Using contrastive learning on a multi-cancer cohort (N=1,720), we achieve a 25-fold improvement in retrieval over baseline methods. Systematic analysis reveals a graduated predictability spectrum: morphologically grounded programs (cell-cycle programs, immune-related) are most reliably predicted (R^2>0.5), while predicting pathways with no morphological footprint remains challenging as expected. We validate clinical utility on the POSEIDON clinical trial: H&E-predicted squamous cell carcinoma scores recapitulate NSCLC subtype identity and predicted IFN-gamma mirror PD-L1 tumor-cell expression groups. Furthermore, genesets describing immune activation and fibrosis predict known tumor microenvironment archetypes from histology alone. We further validate generalization of our approach across unseen cohorts and demonstrate data-efficient domain adaptation, establishing a slide-native framework for molecular analysis on H&E images.

</details>


### [396] [A multi-architecture study of specificity refinement and false-positive mechanism analysis in prostate MRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29977)
*Yongbo Shu,Kewen Chen,Yifeng Yuan,Zirui Xin,Luo Lei,Yang Yang,Xi Chen,Aijing Luo*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了前列腺MRI检测中的残留假阳性，发现假阳性在影像对比特征上与真实癌症高度匹配（而非组织学模仿），且这种现象跨五种架构稳定复现；基于此设计了一个轻量级后处理优化头，在域内可提升病例级特异性（+17.2%），但存在折数条件性波动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前列腺MRI检测中假阳性率居高不下，但现有研究缺乏对残留假阳性性质的深入分析（是模型伪影还是数据本身特征？），也缺乏轻量级、可插拔的后处理优化方案。

Method: 回顾性研究，使用PI-CAI（5折交叉验证）和Prostate158外部数据集；在冻结检测骨干网络上训练一个89,216参数的轻量级优化头，以及一个上下文感知证据头；分析假阳性区域与真实病灶、对侧良性区域的T2、ADC、高b值对比度比率；在五种骨干网络（nnU-Net/U-Net/Mamba/MIGF-Mamba）及多种模态扰动场景下验证。

Result: 假阳性与真实癌症的影像对比度匹配度显著高于良性组织（跨五种架构35/35复现，Cohen's d=1.10，FP/良性证据比2.38倍，模态扰动下105/105复现）；优化头在PI-CAI fold-0将特异性从0.469提升至0.549（+17.2%），灵敏度保持0.943；5折交叉验证显示折数条件性行为（9/15正向，范围-22%~+28%）；Prostate158上两模型饱和（McNemar p=0.69），但假阳性对比匹配现象复现。

Conclusion: 残留假阳性是数据层面的影像特征匹配问题（而非模型特异性伪影），跨架构稳定存在；后处理优化头可在域内带来实用性特异性提升，但效果依赖具体折数。

Abstract: Objectives: To characterize residual false positives in prostate MRI detection, and to evaluate a lightweight post-hoc refinement head for case-level specificity. Materials and Methods: This retrospective study used PI-CAI (5-fold cross-validation) and Prostate158 (n=158; external). A context-aware evidence head and an 89,216-parameter refinement head were trained on a frozen detection backbone; the evidence head was also trained on four further backbones (bare nnU-Net, bare U-Net, bare Mamba, MIGF-Mamba). For each false-positive region, T2-weighted, apparent-diffusion-coefficient, and high-b-value contrast ratios versus peri-lesional rings were compared against ground-truth lesions and contralateral benign regions. Results: False positives were closer to true cancers than to benign tissue in evidence and raw T2-weighted and apparent-diffusion-coefficient contrast, reproducing 35/35 across five architectures (Cohen's d 1.10; FP/benign evidence ratio 2.38x) and 105/105 across modality-perturbation scenarios. On PI-CAI fold-0, refinement raised case-level specificity from 0.469 to 0.549 (+17.2%) at preserved sensitivity (0.943); 5-fold cross-validation showed fold-conditional behavior (9/15 observations positive; range -22% to +28%). On Prostate158, both models saturated (McNemar pooled p=0.69), while the false-positive contrast-matching finding replicated. Conclusion: Residual false positives are contrast-matched to cancer (sharing raw imaging features rather than histologically confirmed mimicry), reproducing across five architectures -- a data-level imaging property, not model-specific artifacts; post-hoc refinement adds practical specificity in-domain but is fold-conditional.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [397] [CLQT: A Closed-Loop, Cost-Aware, Strategy-Consistent Benchmark for Diagnostic Evaluation of LLM Portfolio-Management Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29771)
*Bo Qu,Mingguang Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CLQT 是一个用于评估 LLM 交易智能体的闭环诊断框架，通过可验证的审计轨迹和五轴能力评分卡（APM-CS），将评估从简单的收益排名转变为对智能体推理过程、策略一致性和能力局限性的深度分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试仅通过固定窗口的收益率来排名交易智能体，这种评估方式存在严重缺陷：收益受市场路径主导，且容易因数据泄露而产生虚假的Alpha。排名无法反映智能体的推理质量、策略一致性或持久优势。

Method: CLQT 是一个闭环、成本感知、策略一致且时间门控的交易环境。智能体执行五阶段循环（收集-综合-分配-执行-反思），每次输出可验证哈希链封装的决策记录。通过六大支柱（时间门控、机构级成本建模、策略一致性评分、三层记忆、MCP工具层、任务感知综合）和五轴能力评分卡（一致性、敏锐度、沉着性、纪律性、可靠性）进行评估。

Result: 通过污染控制的多模型回测（含消融实验网格）和实时券商数据（未见过、截止日期后的数据）进行验证，并对比重复运行的噪声基线。实验证明CLQT能将结果与能力分离。

Conclusion: CLQT 不是提供一个模型排名，而是生成一张可扩展、持久的智能体能力与局限地图，实现了对交易智能体更可靠的诊断式评估。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly cast as autonomous portfolio managers, and benchmarks have moved from financial question-answering to sequential trading. Yet most still rank agents by returns over a fixed window -- a weak proxy, since a period's return is dominated by the market path and apparent alpha can dissolve once look-ahead leakage is controlled. Such a ranking certifies neither sound reasoning, nor a consistent strategy, nor a durable edge. We introduce CLQT, which reframes closed-loop trading evaluation as diagnosis rather than ranking: an instrument that localizes where and why an agent's process succeeds or fails. CLQT is a fully closed-loop, cost-aware, strategy-consistent, temporally-gated environment whose agents run a five-stage cycle: gather, synthesize, allocate, execute, reflect. Each round emits a complete DecisionRound sealed into a recompute-verifiable hash chain, so every metric is reconstructable from the trail. Six pillars form the substrate: a hard TimeGate, institutional transaction- and financing-cost modeling, strategy-consistency scoring, three-tier memory, a Model-Context-Protocol tool layer, and mandate-aware synthesis. The same agent runs as a constrained committee of specialized roles or a single full-autonomy orchestrator, making process scaffolding an experimental variable. From the audit trail we compute a five-axis capability scorecard (APM-CS: Coherence, Acuity, Composure, Discipline, Reliability), with Coherence judged partly by a held-out, out-of-cohort LLM to curb self-preference bias. We validate it on a contamination-controlled multi-model backtest with an ablation grid and a live broker track on unseen, post-cutoff data, against a repeated-run noise floor. CLQT separates outcome from capability, yielding not a model ranking but a durable, extensible map of agent competencies and limitations.

</details>


### [398] [Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28374)
*Michael Nguyen,Quoc Nguyen,Paul Vuong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出RSEA（递归自演化智能体），通过三层自然语言状态（策略、技能、剧本）和严格保留验证机制实现安全自演化。实验表明，该方法在ALFWorld上表现最佳（69.3%），但无工件通用最优；无防护的上下文演化存在高风险（如Dynamic Cheatsheet在WebShop上崩溃）；RSEA的保守选择确保了单调安全，从不显著低于基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体通过演化自然语言工件（如反思、工作流、提示优化等）来提升性能，但这些方法通常只在单一基准上报告成功，缺乏公平、对等的比较。作者希望系统性地研究这些方法的实际效果，并探索一种既能自演化又能保证安全性的方法。

Method: 提出RSEA（Recursive Self-Evolving Agent），维护一个三层自然语言状态：命令式策略、可复用技能和程序化剧本。每代通过自身轨迹重写所有三层，并使用严格保留门控（只在不降低保留集性能时提交候选）。在四个基准上对比六个基线方法，均使用相同的本地骨干模型。

Result: 1) 无工件通用最优。RSEA在ALFWorld上单次69.3%（最佳），重试79.4%；但AWM在强骨干工具任务上更优。2) 无防护演化高风险。Dynamic Cheatsheet在ALFWorld上接近最优（70.7%），但在WebShop上崩溃（0.14 vs ReAct 0.43）。3) RSEA的严格保留选择实现单调安全，从不显著低于原始ReAct基线。

Conclusion: 不存在对所有场景通用的最优演化工件；无防护的上下文演化可能不稳定甚至崩溃；RSEA的严格保留选择机制能保证自演化过程的安全性和稳定性，提供了一种可靠的智能体自改进范式。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly improved without weight updates by evolving a natural-language artifact, such as reflections, workflows, playbooks, cheatsheets, or optimized prompts, that conditions a frozen policy. Such methods are typically reported as wins on the single benchmark where they help. We study them apples-to-apples and surface a sharper picture. We introduce RSEA, a Recursive Self-Evolving Agent that carries a compact three-layer natural-language state: an imperative strategy, reusable skills, and a procedural playbook. Across generations, RSEA rewrites all three layers from its own trajectories and commits a candidate only if it does not regress on a disjoint held-out split, using a strict keep-better gate.
  Across four diverse benchmarks, ALFWorld, GAIA, (τ)-bench, and WebShop, and six faithful baselines, ReAct, Reflexion, GEPA, AWM, ACE, and Dynamic Cheatsheet, all evaluated on one shared local backbone, we find three main results. First, no artifact universally wins. RSEA is the strongest single-pass method on ALFWorld, reaching 69.3% compared with 64.6% for ReAct (McNemar (p=0.015)), and reaches 79.4% with retry, the best overall result. However, concrete-workflow induction, represented by AWM, is best on the strong-backbone tool-use tasks. Second, unguarded context evolution is high-variance and unsafe. Dynamic Cheatsheet, which curates context online without a held-out gate, is near-best on ALFWorld at 70.7%, yet collapses on WebShop, with a score of 0.14 compared with 0.43 for ReAct. Third, RSEA's strict held-out selection is what makes recursive self-evolution monotone-safe: it never significantly underperforms the base agent on any benchmark and falls back to vanilla ReAct when evolved context would hurt.

</details>


### [399] [Data and Evaluation Closed-Loop for Model Capability Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28471)
*Zhixuan Li,Jiangan Yuan,Han Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"能力切片"概念，将评测样本按背景条件、任务类型、求解操作和输出约束四维度分组，构建评测-数据闭环映射，使大模型预训练中的能力诊断与数据干预从直觉判断变为可审计、可验证的工程方法。通过两个案例验证：一个将性能下降归因于掩码损失而非推理能力衰退，另一个通过针对性采样大幅提升数学推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大模型预训练中，模型能力是核心变量但无法直接观测，数据塑造能力而评测仅提供回溯性噪声分数。当出现性能失败时，工程师只能凭直觉推断数据修复方向，评测与数据之间缺乏可操作的映射体系。

Method: 提出"能力切片"四维分组方法，构建评测分类体系、非指令数据分类体系和映射规则，形成从基准测试失败到数据干预的闭环流程。

Result: 案例一：将BBH下降46.82%归因于掩码损失，修复后达到66.44超过原检查点；案例二：将数学推理失败分解为具体操作组合，针对性采样使AIME2025/AIME2026 Pass@128从6.67/0.00提升至各26.67。

Conclusion: 评测到数据的推断可以常规化、可审计、可实验验证，而非依赖直觉。

Abstract: Model capability is the central variable in LLM pre-training, yet is never observed directly: data shapes it prospectively, while evaluation reveals it only retrospectively, compressing samples, prompts, decoding, and scoring rules into one noisy score. Practical optimization runs this backward: a failure is observed first, and the engineer must infer the corpus fix. The two sides speak incompatible vocabularies -- benchmark names and per-sample correctness versus data sources, domains, and quality labels -- so this inference is usually intuition, not method. We close this gap with the \emph{capability slice}: a group of evaluation samples sharing background condition, task type, solving operation, and output constraint -- precise enough to localize a single weakness yet stable enough to survive aggregation, unlike a benchmark name, too coarse, or a single sample, too noisy. Built around this unit, an evaluation taxonomy, a non-instruction data taxonomy, and mapping rules form a closed loop turning a benchmark-level failure into a targeted, testable data intervention. We test this loop on two case studies pulling in opposite directions. First, the loop rules the data out: continued pre-training drives BBH down by $-46.82\%$, but diagnosis traces this to a single masked \texttt{\textless EOS\textgreater} loss rather than weakened reasoning; restoring it recovers BBH to $66.44$, above the original checkpoint, without changing the data. Second, the loop rules the data in: a persistent math-reasoning weakness is decomposed by solving operation into specific failing combinations, and a weakness-targeted sampling procedure built from it lifts AIME2025/AIME2026 Pass@128 from $6.67$/$0.00$ to $26.67$ each. The same unmodified loop reaches opposite, correct verdicts in both cases, showing the evaluation-to-data inference can be routine, auditable, and experimentally validated rather than intuitive.

</details>


### [400] [GPTNT: Benchmarking Real-Time Collaboration Between Multimodal Agents on Keep Talking And Nobody Explodes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28514)
*Amit Parekh,Sabrina McCallum,Kareem Al-Hasan,Malvina Nikandrou,Alessandro Suglia,Ioannis Konstas*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出GPTNT基准测试，基于合作游戏《Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes》，测试多模态模型在实时、异步、信息不对称条件下的协作能力，发现当前最先进模型均无法在实时游戏中成功拆弹，暴露了状态追踪、时间压力、歧义处理和错误恢复方面的关键弱点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试将时间压力、信息不对称和不完美通信等协作条件分开研究，缺乏将所有这些条件同时纳入评估的基准，无法全面衡量多模态模型的协作能力。

Method: 基于合作视频游戏《Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes》构建GPTNT基准测试。两个智能体一个能看见并操作炸弹但无拆弹说明，另一个有说明但看不见炸弹，需实时异步通信协作拆弹。通过分别移除说明手册或伙伴来隔离模型从当前交互中推导的能力与已有知识，评估真实协作表现。

Result: 所有测试的闭源和开源模型均无法在实时游戏中成功拆解任何一个炸弹，而人类玩家可以完成。通过控制实验识别出模型在状态追踪、时间压力下的高效行动、歧义处理和错误恢复方面存在关键弱点。

Conclusion: GPTNT作为评估协作性能的基准，填补了现有评估未测量的空白。利用程序化生成和活跃的模组社区，该基准可以随模型进步而演变，避免一次性被解决后失效。

Abstract: Multimodal models are increasingly deployed to solve tasks collaboratively with humans or other artificial agents. Existing benchmarks show that these models possess many of the required component capabilities, but the conditions that coincide in collaboration, including time pressure, information asymmetry, and imperfect communication, are usually studied in isolation. We introduce GPTNT, a benchmark built on the cooperative video game Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes, in which two agents must coordinate to defuse procedurally generated bomb puzzles against a live countdown. One agent can see and manipulate the bomb but does not have the defusal instructions; the other has the instructions but cannot see or manipulate the bomb. Neither agent can succeed alone: success requires effective and efficient communication. Unlike turn-based proxies, GPTNT requires agents to act asynchronously and communicate in real time. GPTNT is designed to separate collaboration from reliance on memorized solutions: the instruction manual, the partner, or both can be withheld to isolate what a model derives in the moment from what it already knows. We show that GPTNT poses a substantial challenge for state-of-the-art systems: none of the closed- or open-source models we test defuses a single bomb in real time, a bar that human players clear. Through controlled experiments, we identify critical weaknesses in state tracking, efficient action under time pressure, ambiguity handling, and error recovery. We release GPTNT as a benchmark for collaborative performance that current evaluations leave unmeasured. Because it runs on the real game, GPTNT benefits from procedural generation and inherits a living modding community, allowing the benchmark to evolve as models improve rather than being solved once and retired.

</details>


### [401] [IMCBench: A benchmark for multimodal LLMs in Image-grounded Medical Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28556)
*Maria Xenochristou,Ashutosh Joshi,Korosh Vatanparvar,Mohammad Abuzar Hashemi,Prasad Kasu,Deepak Bansal,Anchal Nema,Nivedita Wadhwa,Prashams S Jain,Rebecca Abraham,Will Kimbrough,Dilek Hakkani-Tur,Wilko Schulz-Mahlendorf*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: IMCBench是一个基于图像的多轮医疗对话基准，用于评估多模态大模型在安全性、准确性和不确定性表达三个临床维度上的表现。实验发现Claude Opus 4.6综合表现最佳（3.61分），但所有模型在恶性/罕见疾病场景下安全性均下降，且准确的临床描述并不等同于安全的患者指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医疗AI基准存在碎片化问题：有的支持多轮对话但缺少图像，有的提供多模态输入但仅限单轮问答。缺乏同时包含临床图像、多轮交互和全面评估维度的基准。

Method: 构建IMCBench基准，将真实公开临床图像与合成患者档案配对，模拟真实医患对话。采用LLM-as-Jury评分（经临床专家标注校准），从安全性、准确性、不确定性表达三个维度对8个多模态前沿模型（Claude、GPT、Nova、Llama四大家族）进行1-5分评定。

Result: Claude Opus 4.6总分最高（3.61），其次为Claude Sonnet 4.6（3.30）和GPT-5.2（3.29）。恶性/罕见疾病场景下安全性平均下降0.27。去除视觉输入或EHR上下文分别导致安全性下降0.18和0.23。

Conclusion: 准确的临床描述不能保证安全的患者指导，医疗AI评估需要多维度框架，不能仅依赖单一指标。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models and vision-language models have enabled reasoning over multimodal data, offering opportunities for clinical applications such as decision support and triaging. However, existing medical AI benchmarks are fragmented: some support multi-turn dialogues but lack images, while others provide multimodal inputs but focus on single-turn QA tasks. To address this gap, we introduce IMCBench, an image-grounded, multi-turn medical conversation benchmark that pairs real, publicly available clinical images with synthetic patient profiles to simulate realistic patient-clinician interactions. Each conversation is evaluated across three clinical dimensions: safety, accuracy, and appropriate use of uncertainty in diagnosis. We benchmark eight multimodal frontier models across four model families (Claude, GPT, Nova, and Llama), scoring each on a 1-5 scale using LLM-as-Jury scoring calibrated against expert clinician annotations. Our results show that Claude Opus 4.6 achieves the highest overall score (3.61), followed by Claude Sonnet 4.6 (3.30) and GPT-5.2 (3.29), though no model dominates all dimensions and safety degrades for both malignant and rare conditions ($Δ$ = -0.27 each). Ablation studies further reveal that both visual input and EHR context contribute to safe guidance (safety drops of 0.18 and 0.23 on average when each is removed), with stronger models leveraging visual features more effectively. Together, these findings demonstrate that accurate clinical description does not guarantee safe patient guidance, motivating the need for multi-dimensional evaluation frameworks in medical AI.

</details>


### [402] [Search for Truth from Reasoning: A Dynamic Representation Editing Framework for Steering LLM Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28589)
*Tianlong Wang,Yuhang Wang,Weibin Liao,Xin Gao,Xinyu Ma,Yang Lin,Yasha Wang,Liantao Ma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出DynaSteer框架，通过动态表示编辑技术引导大语言模型在推理过程中趋向真理，解决了现有方法难以精确引导模型走向正确推理路径的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Chain-of-Thought等方法虽然鼓励模型多思考，但难以引导其走向真理；表示编辑（RepE）虽能提供内在控制，但在动态推理轨迹中的应用尚未被充分探索。

Method: DynaSteer框架包含三个核心组件：模式聚类以解耦推理流形、Fisher-LDA投影净化真理表示、动态监控前瞻熵以选择性干预并回滚错误轨迹。

Result: 在MATH基准测试上验证了有效性，在跨领域编码任务上进一步证实了泛化能力。

Conclusion: 揭示了推理链中真理的几何特性（句级编码、不确定性原理与衰减效应），并证明了动态表示编辑在提升LLM推理准确性方面的潜力。

Abstract: Current approaches to enhance Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, such as Chain-of-Thought and "Wait" prompts, primarily encourage models to think more, yet often fail to guide them toward Truth. While Representation Editing (RepE) offers a intrinsic control, its application to dynamic reasoning trajectories remains underexplored. In this work, we bridge this gap by investigating the geometry of truth within unfolding reasoning chains. We uncover three critical insights: (1) Truth is encoded at the sentence level and is entangled with latent reasoning patterns; (2) Effective intervention follows an Uncertainty Principle and a Decay Effect, requiring localization to early, high-entropy forks; (3) Naive steering vectors suffer from noise, risking collateral damage to correct trajectories. Based on these findings, we propose DynaSteer, a dynamic RepE framework. DynaSteer employs pattern clustering to disentangle reasoning manifolds and utilizes Fisher-LDA to project purified truth. By dynamically monitoring lookahead entropy, it selectively steers and rolls back trajectories only when necessary. Comprehensive experimental results on several MATH benchmark verify the effectiveness of DynaSteer, and experiments on out-of-domain coding tasks further confirm its generalization ability. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tianlwang/DynaSteer.

</details>


### [403] [Mixture of Debaters: Learn to Debate at Architectural Level in Multi-Agent Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29425)
*Dayong Liang,Kaisong Gong,Yi Cai,Changmeng Zheng,Xiao-Yong Wei*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Mixture of Debaters (MoD)框架，通过MoE范式在单模型内实现动态自我辩论，解决了多智能体辩论系统静态架构和高计算开销的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多智能体辩论框架存在两个关键缺陷：静态架构（智能体角色和协调模式在设计时固定）以及需要实例化多个模型副本导致计算开销过大。

Method: 提出三个关键技术：(1) 双路由机制，解耦角色分配与流程控制；(2) 动量切换，利用局部上下文平滑token级路由，减少专家切换抖动；(3) 统一自我辩论，将不同辩论角色封装为轻量专家模块，消除智能体间通信。

Result: 在多模态基准测试中，MoD优于单模型基线和传统多智能体系统，准确率更高，延迟降低3.7倍，token消耗减少87%。

Conclusion: MoD框架通过单模型内动态自我辩论，实现了高效、低开销的多角度推理，代码已开源。

Abstract: Existing multi-agent debate frameworks suffer from two critical limitations: they rely on static architectures where agent roles and coordination patterns are fixed at design time, and they require instantiating multiple model copies, incurring substantial computational overhead. We propose Mixture of Debaters (MoD), a unified framework that enables dynamic self-debate within a single model by leveraging the Mixture-of-Experts paradigm. We address three key challenges in adapting MoE for dialectical reasoning: (1) dual-routing that decouples role allocation from process flow, dynamically determining when to debate versus when to synthesize; (2) momentum switching that smooths token-level routing with local context, reducing expert-switch jitter; and (3) unified self-debate that encapsulates diverse debating personas into lightweight expert modules, eliminating inter-agent communication while preserving behavioral diversity. Extensive experiments on multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that MoD outperforms both single-model baselines and conventional multi-agent systems, achieving superior accuracy with 3.7x lower latency and 87% reduction in token consumption.The source code can be accessed at https://github.com/YongLD/MoD.

</details>


### [404] [Aristotelian Virtue Profiling of LLMs through Ethical Dilemmas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28683)
*Ioannis Tzachristas,John Pavlopoulos*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出VirtueMap框架，基于亚里士多德美德伦理学，通过让人类或LLM对七个伦理困境中的五个回应进行排序，并利用95%以上一致的参考排序作为基准，使用归一化Borda对齐评分，评估九种LLM家族的美德表现，发现平均排序一致性达90.3%，差异主要体现在勇气、节制和正义上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM常面临伦理权衡问题，不同回应虽有道理但体现不同价值观（如公平、诚实、勇气等），现有方法缺乏系统描述这种美德模式的框架。

Method: 构建七个通用伦理困境，每个困境设计五个回应；为每个困境和美德定义参考排序，收集超100份人类评价，仅保留95%以上一致的排序；使用归一化Borda对齐计算排名得分，生成实践智慧、正义、诚实、勇气、节制五个美德剖面；对九个LLM家族进行重复运行评估。

Result: LLM平均排名一致性达90.3%，差异主要体现在勇气、节制和正义三个美德维度。

Conclusion: VirtueMap能有效刻画LLM在伦理困境中的美德倾向，并发布交互网站供本地分析比较。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often face ethical tradeoffs in which several responses may be defensible but express different priorities, such as fairness, honesty, courage, or restraint. We introduce VirtueMap, a framework for describing these patterns through an Aristotelian virtue-ethics lens. Instead of asking for a single correct answer, VirtueMap asks humans or LLMs to rank all five responses to each of seven general, non-lethal, non-political, and non-religious ethical dilemmas. To define the reference orderings used for scoring, we first proposed, for each dilemma and virtue, an ordering of the five responses from most to least expressive of that virtue. We then collected more than 100 respondent evaluations per ordering and retained it as operational ground truth only when at least 95% confirmed it. Rankings are scored against these retained orderings using normalized Borda alignment, yielding profiles over Practical Wisdom, Justice, Truthfulness, Courage, and Temperance. We apply VirtueMap to nine LLM families in a repeated-run evaluation and find high mean rank consistency (90.3%), with the largest differences appearing on Courage, Temperance, and Justice. We also release an interactive website that computes profiles locally in the browser and compares respondents with measured LLM profiles.

</details>


### [405] [An AI agent for treatment reasoning over a biomedical tool universe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28692)
*Shanghua Gao,Ayush Noori,Richard Zhu,Curtis Ginder,Zhenglun Kong,Xiaorui Su,Justin Kauffman,Benjamin S. Glicksberg,Joshua Lampert,Ankit Sakhuja,Ashwin Sawant,ATHENA-R1 Evaluation Consortium,David A. Clifton,Noa Dagan,Ran Balicer,Marinka Zitnik*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出ATHENA-R1，一个基于强化学习的AI治疗推理代理，覆盖1939年以来所有FDA批准药物。通过两级自学习框架（多智能体系统构建训练数据+强化学习优化推理质量），在3168项药物推理任务和456个患者治疗案例上达到94.7%的开放药物推理准确率和82.9%的治疗推理准确率，显著优于GPT-5等模型。专家和医师评估均偏好该模型，其生成的不良事件假设在540万患者电子健康记录中得到验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 治疗推理需要整合疾病背景、合并症、药物、禁忌症等多维信息，传统AI难以处理这种需要先明确证据需求再得出结论的迭代过程。现有方法缺乏可学习的证据收集机制，且依赖人工标注的训练轨迹，难以规模化。

Method: 采用两级自学习框架：(1) 多智能体系统自动构建工具、任务和推理轨迹用于监督微调；(2) 基于科学反馈的强化学习，奖励证据收集、工具使用的准确性、逻辑非冗余性等推理质量指标。模型在212个生物医学工具的知识宇宙中运行，每一步识别缺失信息、选择并执行相关工具、整合证据。

Result: 在5个基准测试、3168项药物推理任务和456个患者治疗案例中，ATHENA-R1达到94.7%的药物推理准确率和82.9%的治疗推理准确率，比GPT-5分别高出17.8和10.7个百分点。28个罕见病组织的专家首选项显著高于参考模型。心血管和感染性疾病病例中获得医师好评。不良事件假设在540万患者EHR中验证，调整后优势比达1.48-1.84。

Conclusion: 治疗推理可以重新定义为可学习的迭代证据收集过程，强化学习能够有效训练AI执行这一任务。ATHENA-R1证明了在没有人工标注轨迹的情况下，通过自学习和科学反馈可以训练出高质量的治疗推理AI代理。

Abstract: Treatment reasoning underpins every therapeutic decision, integrating disease context, comorbidities, medications, contraindications, and evolving biomedical knowledge to select an appropriate therapy. It is inherently iterative: candidates are weighed against many constraints, revised as evidence emerges, and grounded in verifiable sources. Here we introduce ATHENA-R1, an AI agent for treatment reasoning across all FDA approved drugs since 1939, trained by reinforcement learning over a universe of 212 biomedical tools. At each step it identifies missing information, selects and runs relevant tools, and incorporates the evidence. To train it without human-annotated traces, we build a two-level self-learning framework: multi-agent systems construct the tools, tasks, and reasoning trajectories for supervised fine-tuning, then reinforcement learning with scientific feedback rewards reasoning quality (evidence gathering, grounded tool use, logical non-redundancy). Across five benchmarks of 3,168 drug reasoning tasks and 456 patient treatment cases, ATHENA-R1 outperforms language models and tool-use systems, reaching 94.7% accuracy on open-ended drug reasoning and 82.9% on treatment reasoning, 17.8 and 10.7 points above GPT-5. In blinded evaluations by experts from 28 rare disease organizations, it is preferred over reference models on all criteria, and physicians rated it favorably on complex hospitalized cardiovascular and infectious-disease cases. Adverse-event hypotheses it generated, tested in electronic health records from 5.4 million patients, reached adjusted odds ratios of 1.48-1.84, with no elevation among negative controls. Because it requires knowing what evidence to seek before concluding, treatment reasoning has long been hard for AI; we show it can be reframed as a learnable process of iterative evidence gathering that reinforcement learning can train AI to perform.

</details>


### [406] [COMPASS: Grounding Composition-Intent Guidance in Unified Multimodal Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28696)
*Ziqi Zhou,Weize Quan,Mining Tan,Zhihan Chen,Dandan Zheng,Jingdong Chen,Jun Zhou,Weiming Dong,Dong-Ming Yan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: COMPASS是首个统一的多模态框架，通过共享专家令牌τ_c在单一系统中同时实现构图感知和构图引导生成，显著提升了对细粒度构图的理解和可控生成能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的统一多模态模型在细粒度构图识别上不可靠，且难以将构图意图转化为可控生成。需要一个统一的框架来同时解决构图感知和构图引导生成问题。

Method: 提出COMPASS框架：1）感知端：将构图专家知识注入MoE主干，蒸馏出共享专家令牌τ_c；2）生成端：将τ_c作为全局条件信号引导去噪过程；3）构建Comp-11大规模数据集支持指令跟随的构图学习。

Result: COMPASS在类别级构图理解上显著提升，并且相比强基线模型生成了更符合构图意图、更忠实于提示的图像。

Conclusion: COMPASS通过统一框架有效桥接了构图感知与构图引导生成，为细粒度视觉意图控制提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Composition is a high-level visual intent that governs where subjects are placed and how a scene is organized, yet current unified multimodal models remain unreliable at fine-grained composition recognition and struggle to turn such intent into controllable generation. We present COMPASS, the first unified multimodal framework that grounds composition-intent control in a single system spanning both composition perception and composition-guided generation, with a shared expert token $τ_c$ as the central intent anchor. On the perception side, COMPASS injects composition expertise into an MoE backbone in a minimally invasive manner and distills the inferred intent into $τ_c$. On the generation side, COMPASS reuses $τ_c$ as a global conditioning signal that steers the denoising trajectory, effectively converting passive composition analysis into explicit layout control. To support systematic instruction-following composition learning and evaluation at scale, we construct Comp-11, a large-scale dataset with an 11-class taxonomy and reasoning-augmented annotations. Extensive experiments show that COMPASS substantially improves category-level composition understanding and delivers more composition-consistent, prompt-faithful generation than strong baselines.

</details>


### [407] [BV-Blend: Uncertainty-Weighted Historical Baselines for Stable Critic-Free RL with Verifiable Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28707)
*Yupeng Chang,Yuan Wu,Yi Chang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: BV-Blend提出了一种无需评论家的强化学习方法，通过结合语义聚类历史统计与提示本地统计来稳定优势估计，解决了GRPO在二值验证器冷启动阶段因组内奖励方差为零导致学习停滞的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO等无评论家RLVR方法在二值验证器冷启动时，因组内奖励方差为零导致优势估计失效，学习停滞。

Method: 提出BV-Blend框架：维护语义聚类的EMA跟踪奖励矩，基于标准误代理导出置信权重，将历史基线/方差与提示本地统计混合，用于PPO风格的裁剪更新。

Result: 在可验证推理基准上，BV-Blend提升了训练稳定性和性能，在组归一化方法可能停滞的场景下保持鲁棒。

Conclusion: BV-Blend有效解决了无评论家RLVR中优势估计不稳定的问题，尤其在二值奖励冷启动场景下表现优异。
